title: 3 Lifes
description: A plugin that will limit the number of player respawns on the server to three. You'll lose all three lives and never come back...
body:
The plugin will add a limited number of player respawns. The plugin will be useful for servers with limited places for players, that is, after killing one game three times, he will no longer be able to be reborn and a new player will take his place. This plugin is an analogue of the hardcore game mode for multiplayer servers.

You also can use command "/givelife <player>" to gift lives to player from your lifes counter.

Command "/setlifes <player> <lifes count>" can set how many lifes player will have.

For every hour in game player get 1 more life.
